title: KOICA PDM
description: ID-linked results-chain DAG for a KOICA Project Design Matrix. Describes the data format only; KOICA guideline rules (e.g. output count 3-4) are enforced by checklist.json / validate-critical.sh, not by this schema.

use_case.description: What the user is doing (asked first, before mode). Confirmed labels (2026-07-09): intl-dev = 국제개발협력(PDM) — PDM matrix view, 사업 단위; biz-dev = 임팩트 스타트업(신규사업개발) — ToC view, 조직 단위 가능; csr-esg = 사회공헌(CSR, ESG) — ToC view, 사업 단위; nonprofit = 비영리(재단·NGO) — ToC view, 조직 단위 가능(연차보고서 입력 잦음); invest-screen = 임팩트 투자사 (투심; backlog, not offered). The results-chain logic is identical across use-cases; only the rendered end-view and which structures are required differ. ToC-view use-cases = biz-dev, csr-esg, nonprofit.

unit.description: 입력 단위. project = 사업(프로젝트) 하나 (intl-dev, csr-esg 기본). org = 조직 단위 입력 (biz-dev, nonprofit에서 가능 — 다수 프로젝트 포함 문서). 변화이론은 프로젝트 단위로 만들어지므로, org 입력이며 다수 프로젝트가 감지되면 사용자에게 [전체 프로젝트 vs 특정 프로젝트] 분기를 물어야 한다 (SKILL Phase 1 step 0b).

org_context.description: unit=org일 때의 조직 컨텍스트. 특정 프로젝트를 골라 내려간 경우에도 부모 조직 정보를 보존한다.

mission.description: 조직 미션 — 전체 프로젝트 뷰에서 각 프로젝트가 미션과 어떻게 연결되는지 보여주는 축.

selected_project.description: 특정 프로젝트 분기에서 사용자가 고른 프로젝트 이름. 전체 프로젝트 뷰면 null.

input_source.description: Q1 of Phase 1: concept = user has only an idea; inputs = user has documents (plan/draft/existing PDM) to read.

interaction.description: Q2 of Phase 1: interview = step-by-step Q&A; draft = table-first (generate a draft then edit).

mode.description: Resolved legacy label: A = concept+interview, B = inputs+interview (also inputs+draft, with gate_mode DRAFT), C = concept+draft. Derived from input_source × interaction.

gate_mode.description: GATE = new PDM (blocking); AUDIT = existing/approved PDM (report-only); DRAFT = draft-first work-in-progress (report-only until the user finalizes, which flips it to GATE)

impact.description: Per KOICA guideline p.23, Impact has NO indicators/MoV. The schema permits the optional 'indicators'/'mov' fields ONLY so AUDIT mode can represent real/approved PDMs that deviate; rule C01 flags them in GATE mode.

indicators.description: AUDIT/ingestion only — guideline-noncompliant; flagged by rule C01

mov.description: AUDIT/ingestion only — guideline-noncompliant; flagged by rule C01

outcomes.description: Outcome count is unconstrained at every layer; the prior single-outcome rule (C07) was removed 2026-06-05.

outputs.description: Schema permits any count for ingestion; output count 3-4 is enforced as rule C02.

from_activities.description: Activity IDs that produce this output

inputs.description: 투입물. ODA/intl-dev construct (KOICA 사업은 전체 예산 기반). For ToC-view use-cases (biz-dev/csr-esg/nonprofit), keep minimal and omit the recipient/수원기관 block (koica-rules.md §11.1).

recipient.description: 수원기관 분담재원/기타자원. ODA/intl-dev only — OMIT for ToC-view use-cases (biz-dev/csr-esg/nonprofit) (the target is the end beneficiary, not a recipient institution).

definition.description: What the indicator measures, in one line (지표 정의).

formula.description: 산출식 — the calculation, when derivable (rate/ratio/index/count): e.g. "시설분만율 = 시설분만 건수 ÷ 전체 분만 건수 × 100". Null for purely qualitative indicators.

measurement_target.description: 측정 대상 — what/whom is being measured (사회공헌·비영리 지표 DB column). Fill ONLY for ToC-view use-cases (biz-dev/csr-esg/nonprofit); null for intl-dev (KOICA PDM), which does not use this column.

baseline.description: Deferred by default: the canonical placeholder is the string "추후 확정" (set post-finalization from field survey — koica-rules.md §4.8). A concrete value may be supplied if the user volunteers one.

target.description: Deferred by default: canonical placeholder "추후 확정". When deferred, A05 (target realism) is N/A. koica-rules.md §4.8.

target_rationale.description: Deferred with the target ('추후 확정') unless a concrete target is supplied.

mov.description: Means of Verification for this indicator (required non-empty by rule C04)
